printers.name: Creality K2 Pro Combo
printers.note: Primary FDM fleet target with multicolor CFS and dual AI camera; using local simulated status until a live adapter is wired.

printers.name: Creality HALOT-ONE (CL-60)
printers.note: Fine-detail resin path for small precision parts, molds, and detail prototypes.

printers.name: Creality Falcon 5W Laser
printers.note: Laser path for engraving, templates, masking, light cutting, and signage.

printers.name: Titoe 4540 CNC Router
printers.note: CNC path for stock removal, cut paths, fixture planning, and stronger final fabrication work.

printers.name: Cricut Joy Xtra
printers.note: Craft-cutter path for labels, vinyl masks, stencils, and household organization support.

safetyNotes: Require eye protection for cutting, sanding, and CNC-adjacent work.
Require machine-specific ventilation and fire-awareness for laser and resin workflows.
Treat resin, laser, and CNC jobs as higher-risk workflows than ordinary FDM prototyping.
Treat vendor uploads as staged until explicit approval.
Prototype with forgiving materials before committing to expensive fabrication.
designNotes: Prefer overbuilt outdoor replacements with drain paths and fatigue-aware geometry.
Scout motif is welcome as long as it does not weaken the load path.
Use printed prototypes to validate hole spacing and fit before final material selection.
Route work by machine class: FDM for fit and speed, resin for detail, laser for masks/templates, CNC for stronger final geometry, Cricut for labels and stencils.
cadNotes: Prefer parameter-driven geometry for brackets, hole spacing, offsets, and bend relief.
Generate OpenSCAD-style stubs that are easy to adjust by hand later.
printPrepNotes: Start with fit-check settings before structural settings.
Orient parts so critical stress regions do not rely only on weak layer adhesion.
safetyInterlocks: manual review before live machine run

inventory.name: Stainless fasteners pack
inventory.restockNote: Buy another pack on the next supply run.
